description: Bird was slightly larger than "empids". Head was brown with dark eye & obscure incomplete eyering. Bill was narrower than a finch & slightly longer than half the bird's head width. Bill had dark upper mandible & solid yellow appearing lower mandible. Back had noticeably olive greenish tones. Wings were brown but darker than head & with prominent white wingbars. Tertials were also dark with fairly crisp white edges. Underparts white with obscure off-white vest & vague off-white breast band appearing incomplete. Legs and feet were dark.Behaviors: Bird perched atop or near top of low growing shrubs and small trees giving about three call notes in 15 minutes of observation. It occasionally flew from one perch to another or grabbed an insect & returned to original perch. Bird did not flick tail or wings.Call: A sparingly given but loud clear high-pitched "peeeeeee" or "peeeeeei"Plumage: adult
